spell_resistance.value: yes (harmless) equal to 10 + double this spell’s level against psychic magic and any mind-affecting effects. description.value: You project a fortress of mental power that blocks out the psychic energy of others, granting mental strength and resiliency to all inside the area. All creatures inside the area gain
